steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The blank describes what the hoax entries were "finally recognized as" before deletion. The passage calls them "fictitious entries" and "hoaxes" — they are made-up, false things.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
A. analyses — an analysis is a careful study or examination of something. Hoax entries are not studies; plug in: "recognized as analyses" makes no sense here. Eliminated.

B. revelations — a revelation is something newly disclosed or revealed, usually surprising and true. These entries were not truth coming to light; they were lies. Eliminated.

C. fabrications — a fabrication is a made-up falsehood. Plug in: "recognized as fabrications" = recognized as made-up lies. This matches exactly what hoax entries are. Correct.

D. enhancements — an enhancement is an improvement. Hoax entries did not improve Wikipedia; they deceived readers. Eliminated.
